title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen fails to load images and data when opened without internet, but recovers after reconnection
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the app is connected to the internet (Wi-Fi or cellular) and a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and visible on the Home screen.
4. Turn off all internet connections on the mobile device (disable Wi-Fi and cellular data).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the Home screen for the paired device and any internet-dependent content (e.g., images, banners, or promotional graphics).
7. Reconnect the mobile device to the internet (enable Wi-Fi or cellular data).
8. Observe the Home screen again for the loading and display of all previously missing data and images.
expected: When the app is opened without an internet connection, the paired device should still be displayed on the Home screen, but internet-dependent features (e.g., images) may be missing. After reconnecting to the internet, all data and images should load and display properly.
